title: Backfill Pre-Generated User IDs for CRM Lookup
description:
## Context
To support CRM integration and API lookups, all existing DataTools Pro users need a referenceable user ID that maps to the CRM. Pre-generated user IDs were backfilled for all previously added users.

## Action
Backfill user ID prefixes for all existing users to enable CRM-to-DataTools-Pro mapping and future API integrations.
acceptance_criteria: All existing users have pre-generated user IDs with the correct prefix
IDs are referenceable from the CRM
API integrations can use these IDs for lookup
data_model_changes: Backfilled pre-generated user IDs with standardized prefixes for all existing users.
implementation_notes: One-time data backfill to ensure all users have referenceable IDs for CRM and API integrations.
